name: Get Division Lead Count by Lead Score Rank

content.query:
SELECT 
[anr_ev_rank]
,[dsp_id]
,Productid
,[src_id] as LeadSource
,[srs_id]
,srs.Descr as LeadSubSource
,count(lds.id) as LeadCount
,sum(GSA) as GSA
 FROM 
 [ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads] lds
 ,[ODS].[LP_FHI_srs_SourceSubs] srs
 where 
 lds.[EntryDate] > '2022-10-01'
 and lds.srs_id = srs.id
 group by
 [anr_ev_rank]
,[dsp_id]
,Productid
,[src_id]
,[srs_id]
,srs.Descr
order by GSA DESC
